description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 24 (Tuesday), Hanno City and Fuji Pharmacy Co., Ltd. signed a comprehensive partnership agreement.

Fuji Pharmacy Co., Ltd. operates under the slogan "Deliver vitality. Continue vitality." with a mission to support people's healthy lives. The company provides quality services that are close to community members' needs through placement medicine sales, drugstore and prescription pharmacy operations, and development and manufacturing of pharmaceuticals.

In recent years, the company has been promoting partnership agreements with local governments to support their community development initiatives through business activities. Hanno City has decided to sign this comprehensive partnership agreement to leverage their knowledge and experience and work together on community development through mutual cooperation.

Moving forward, both parties will work together to strengthen disaster prevention and disaster response measures, promote citizens' health, and aim for regional revitalization.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13362.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City signs comprehensive partnership agreement with Fuji Pharmacy Co., Ltd.
